ground_truth.title: Custom College Admission Plans & Packages | Professional Tutoring
ground_truth.main_content: College Admissions Plans & Packages: Which of our packages is right for you? College Admissions Initial Consultation (6th-12th grades), Academic Planning and Resume Package (6th-10th grades), Academic Planning and Resume Package: Checkup (7th-11th grades), All-Inclusive Package (11th-12th grades), The Elite Applicant Package (11th-12th grades). The College Admissions Initial Consultation helps families navigate the path to a successful and fulfilling future. In this first meeting, we create a customized plan for high school achievement and college admissions. During the consultation, our experts assess a student's strengths and areas for improvement, while discussing both high school and college aspirations and potential career paths. Deliverables include a two-hour student-centered meeting focused on the PT College Selection Survey, thorough analysis of academic transcript and standardized test scores, evaluation of secondary school course rigor including AP/IB/Honors options, personalized course selection recommendations, customized standardized testing plan, assessment of academic, social, and athletic involvement, insight into extracurricular activities and community service, evaluation of how achievements align with college admissions goals, detailed review of the college admissions process, calculated probability of college admissions, discussion on college costs and financial aid, curated list of potential colleges, expert advice on working with school guidance, and The Official Julia Ross College Admissions Handbook.
with: The College Admissions Initial Consultation helps families navigate the path to a successful and fulfilling future.
In this first meeting, we create a customized plan for high school achievement and college admissions.
Our experienced college coach guides students in making informed decisions about academic courses, extracurriculars, athletics, leadership roles, and community service.
The All-Inclusive Package provides students and families with full-service support in navigating the entire college admissions process.
The Elite Applicant Package provides bespoke coaching to high-achieving students who intend to apply to the most competitive universities.
